title: rate of exchange #sr
body:
lyrics

i'm bringing up the finest diamonds mining my own
but y'all complain it ain't cut yet
whatcha want an invitation to step on it
take it if you can
i ain't making alone
crush it til you can push it
when you come back for more
you can tell me this ain't that good shit
while we laugh at our jobs
whistle while you work you don't have to get off
after your off
after ours is someone else's
i slack in the office
do too much you leave tracks in the carpet
black streaks back to the carpit
then collapse at the apartment
depending on traffic you might pass by the tarpits
aww shit yall
we all get old and fall apart
faster when it's harder to find a place to park
driving around tired when it's way too dark
thoughts balder than my tires
hard to get a grip once the hairs all off
miss my barber
but he's fired
i can't afford small talk
or getting gassed up
and it's a long walk
plus i'm not sure i have enough time before tomorrow
but enough of that alll
sorry to interrupt y'all
how can i assist you today on this toll-free phone call
with some hidden fees i can't even see to say
so they don't need to alarm y'all
leave a message after the beep and my thoughts'll be on y'all

collaborators

exit pathways (https://soundcloud.com/wiregrrrl/exit-pathways) by wiregrrrl (https://soundcloud.com/wiregrrrl)

videos



art



recordings

notes

still hoping to make contact with wiregrrrl
